summary: Excellent audience recording with crystal‑clear sound captures a fun, high‑energy performance that reviewers rank among the best of the tour.
review: The three reviewers unanimously praise the audio quality, calling it the best‑sounding source and noting its sweet‑spot clarity even from an audience perspective. They also describe the show as very enjoyable and one of the top performances of the year, only eclipsed by the famed 11/1 concert.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly favorable (4‑5 stars) and consistently highlight both superb recording fidelity and a strong musical performance, giving the combined weighted rating near the top of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers mention front‑row sweet spot placement, crystal‑clear theater sound and rank it as the best or second‑best audience source they own, indicating very high clarity and balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as a ton of fun with great energy; reviewers consider it one of the top shows on the tour, only behind the legendary 11/1 performance.
